author: 2ZD1
content:
Correction to previous handoff comment: this project's hook-config.json blocks 'git apply'. Use the system 'patch' tool instead, from inside your worktree:

  patch -p1 < ../../.salvage-IS4n-s15o-protocol.patch

(Or if your cwd is the project root: 'patch -p1 -d .worktrees/<your-worktree> < .salvage-IS4n-s15o-protocol.patch')
